title: Build Tree from Preorder + Inorder
description: Given the preorder and inorder traversals of a binary tree (with distinct values), reconstruct it and output the postorder traversal.
inputSpec: First line: n. Second line: preorder (n integers). Third line: inorder (n integers).
outputSpec: The postorder traversal: n integers space-separated.

botCodes.code:
n=int(input())
pre=list(map(int,input().split()))
ino=list(map(int,input().split()))
def build(pre,ino):
    if not pre:return []
    root=pre[0]
    idx=ino.index(root)
    l=build(pre[1:1+idx],ino[:idx])
    r=build(pre[1+idx:],ino[idx+1:])
    return l+r+[root]
print(*build(pre,ino))
